On s'attend à ce que le climat du Yukon devienne plus humide au fil du temps, mais il se peut que la dégradation du pergélisol fasse augmenter la recharge des eaux souterraines, ce qui amplifierait le débit de base hivernal.

Le débit hivernal (ou débit de base) est actuellement estimé à bien au-dessus de la normale dans la plupart du bassin du fleuve Yukon, à l'exception de la rivière Nordenskiold près de Carmacks, qui est en dessous de la normale. Le niveau d'eau du lac Marsh est également en dessous de la normale. Les rivières Alsek, Peel et Porcupine sont aussi bien au-dessus de la normale. La rivière Liard fait exception, avec un débit de base en dessous de la normale à cette période de l'année.

Compte tenu de l'accumulation de neige actuellement au-dessus de la normale, la plupart du territoire devrait connaître des volumes de crues printanières allant d'un peu au-dessus de la normale à bien au-dessus de la normale. Les exceptions sont les rivières Stewart et Mayo et leurs affluents, dont les volumes de crue printanière tendent à être près de la normale.

Le relevé nivométrique du 1^er^ avril capture généralement la plus haute valeur d'équivalent en eau de la neige de l'hiver et est le prédicteur le plus robuste du potentiel d'inondation des crues printanières. Cependant, les conditions actuelles d'accumulation de neige suggèrent un potentiel d'inondation des crues printanières au-dessus de la moyenne pour les petits ruisseaux dans les bassins de la rivière Teslin/Big Salmon, du Yukon central, de la rivière White, de la rivière Liard, du Yukon inférieur et du Yukon supérieur (région des lacs du Sud/Whitehorse). Il y a un risque d'inondation élevé pour les collectivités de Teslin, Upper Liard et la vallée du Klondike. L'accumulation de neige dans les lacs du Sud est bien au-dessus de la normale dans le bassin inférieur, similar à 2022, mais l'accumulation de neige en montagne à haute altitude est plus proche de la normale. Bien que l'accumulation de neige au-dessus de la normale augmente le potentiel d'inondation pour les lacs du Sud, le moment de la fonte des neiges, les précipitations estivales et la fonte des glaciers agissent ensemble pour créer les inondations, ce qui rend le potentiel d'inondation plus incertain comparé à d'autres collectivités. Le niveau d'eau constamment en dessous de la moyenne du lac Marsh tout au long de l'hiver indique également des niveaux d'eau souterraines plus bas, renforcé par la surveillance en temps réel des eaux souterraines dans plusieurs zones de la région."
}`

# `r titles$MAP1`

```{r MAP_TEMP, echo=FALSE, eval=TRUE, fig.show='hold', fig.width=9, fig.height=11}
# r UpperYukonRiver_Snow, echo=FALSE, eval=include, out.width='.49\\linewidth', fig.width=4, fig.height=3,fig.show='hold',fig.align='center'
# graphics::par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

# Plot SWE
tryCatch(
  {
    ret <- make_snowbull_map(
      year = bulletin_year,
      month = bulletin_month,
      statistic = "anomalies",
      language = language$language,
      format = "ggplot",
      param_name = "temperature, air",
      snowbull_timeseries = dat,
      snowbull_shapefiles = shps,
      con = con
    )
    ret$map
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Map generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

# `r titles$MAP2`

```{r MAP_PRECIP, echo=FALSE, eval=TRUE, fig.show='hold', fig.width=9, fig.height=11}
# r UpperYukonRiver_Snow, echo=FALSE, eval=include, out.width='.49\\linewidth', fig.width=4, fig.height=3,fig.show='hold',fig.align='center'
# graphics::par(mfrow = c(1, 2))


idx <- dat$precipitation$metadata$location_id == "16" | dat$precipitation$metadata$location_id == "383"
dat$precipitation$metadata <- dat$precipitation$metadata[!idx, ]

dat$precipitation$timeseries$data[, "388"] <- NA
dat$precipitation$timeseries$data[, "16"] <- NA
dat$precipitation$timeseries$data[, "383"] <- NA


# Plot SWE
tryCatch(
  {
    ret <- make_snowbull_map(
      year = bulletin_year,
      month = bulletin_month,
      statistic = "relative_to_med",
      language = language$language,
      format = "ggplot",
      param_name = "precipitation, total",
      con = con,
      snowbull_timeseries = dat,
      snowbull_shapefiles = shps
    )
    ret$map
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Map generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

# `r titles$MAP3`

```{r MAP_SWE, echo=FALSE, eval=TRUE, fig.show='hold', fig.width=9, fig.height=11}
# r UpperYukonRiver_Snow, echo=FALSE, eval=include, out.width='.49\\linewidth', fig.width=4, fig.height=3,fig.show='hold',fig.align='center'
# graphics::par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

# Plot SWE
tryCatch(
  {
    ret <- make_snowbull_map(
      year = bulletin_year,
      month = bulletin_month,
      statistic = "relative_to_med",
      language = language$language,
      format = "ggplot",
      param_name = "snow water equivalent",
      snowbull_timeseries = dat,
      snowbull_shapefiles = shps,
      con = con
    )
    ret$map
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Map generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```





```{r Upper Yukon, echo=FALSE}
# Run or don't run following chunks
if ("Upper Yukon" %in% params$basins) {
  include <- TRUE
} else {
  include <- FALSE
}

basin_name <- "Upper_Yukon"

met_name_ta <- "Tagish Meteorological" # Tagish
met_name_lc <- "Log Cabin Meteorological" # Log Cabin
met_name_wc <- "Wolf Creek Buckbrush Taiga Meteorological" # Wolf Creek

basin_swe <- basins_table[basins_table$name == basin_name, ]

pillow_ta <- pillows_table[pillows_table$name == met_name_ta, ]
pillow_lc <- pillows_table[pillows_table$name == met_name_lc, ]
pillow_wc <- pillows_table[pillows_table$name == met_name_wc, ]
```

# `r titles$UPPER_YUKON`

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The Upper Yukon River Basin snowpack is " else "L’accumulation de neige dans le bassin supérieur du fleuve Yukon est "`
`r officer::ftext(basin_swe$description, get_text_fmt(basin_swe$text_colour))`.
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("At Tagish Meteorological Station, Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) is estimated to be **", pillow_ta$relative_to_med, "%** of normal (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "A1) while at Wolf Creek Subalpine Meteorological Station, SWE is estimated to be **", pillow_wc$relative_to_med, "%** of normal (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "A2). Established in 2023, Log Cabin Meteorological Station registered SWE at **", pillow_lc$relative_to_med, "%** of normal when compared with the manual snow survey record for that site (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "A3). The Upper Yukon basin-averaged SWE is estimated to be **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", basin_swe$value, " mm** as of ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B)." )
} else {
paste0("À la station météorologique de Tagish, l’équivalent en eau de la neige (ÉEN) est estimé à **", pillow_ta$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "A1), tandis qu’à la station subalpine du ruisseau Wolf, il est estimé à **", pillow_wc$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "A2). Installé en 2023, la station météorologique de Log Cabin a enregistré un ÉEN de **", pillow_lc$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale si l’on compare avec les archives du relevé manuel de l’enneigement pour cet emplacement (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "A3). L’EEN moyen du bassin est estimé à **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", basin_swe$value, " mm** au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], " (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B)." )
}`



```{r UpperYukonRiver_Snow, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
graphics::par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

## A1 Tagish

# Plot SWE
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullpillow(
      timeseries = dat$swe$pillows$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(pillow_ta$key))],
      location_id = pillow_ta$location,
      subplot = "1",
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name_ta)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)


## A2 Wolf Creek
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullpillow(
      timeseries = dat$swe$pillows$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(pillow_wc$key))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name_wc))),
      location_id = pillow_wc$location,
      subplot = "2"
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

```{r UpperYukon_basin, echo=FALSE, eval=include, out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))


# A3 Log cabin
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullpillow(
      timeseries = dat$swe$pillows$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(pillow_lc$key))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name_lc))),
      subplot = "3"
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)


# B
# Snow course plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullSWE(
      loc_name = trb(paste0("basin_", fmt_tr_key(basin_name))),
      timeseries = dat$swe$basins$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", basin_name)]
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```


```{r UpperYukon_Whitehorse, echo=FALSE}
loc_name <- "Whitehorse"
met_name <- "Whitehorse ECCC Met" # 48168
met_id <- precip_table[precip_table$name == met_name, ]$key
precip <- precip_table[precip_table$name == met_name, ]
fdd <- fdd_table[fdd_table$name == met_name, ]
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "Whitehorse precipitation has been " else "Les précipitations à Whitehorse ont été "`
`r officer::ftext(precip$description, get_text_fmt(precip$text_colour))`. 
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("from October through ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C). Cumulative winter precipitation was **", precip$relative_to_med, "%** of normal on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1. Cumulative degree-days of freezing (CDDF) are **", fdd$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", fdd$value, "\u00B0C-Days** on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), which suggests ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), " on rivers and lakes of the region.")
} else  {
paste0("d’octobre à ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C). Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], ", les précipitations hivernales cumulatives se chiffrent à **", precip$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, et les degrés-jours de gel cumulés à **", fdd$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", fdd$value, " \u00B0C-jours** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), ce qui laisse penser que l'épaisseur de glace sur les lacs et les cours d'eau de la région est ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), ".")
}`

```{r UpperYukon_weather, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", warnings=FALSE, fig.height=fig.height_half}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
# Plot C

tryCatch(
  {
    snowBullPrecip(
      timeseries = dat$precip$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)

# Plot D
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullCDDF(
      timeseries = dat$fdd$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name))),
      location_id = fdd$location
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

```{r UpperYukon_levels, echo=FALSE}
hydro_name_ml <- "Marsh Lake Near Whitehorse"
hydro_name_ll <- "Lake Laberge Near Whitehorse"

hydro_id_ml <- level_table[level_table$name == hydro_name_ml, ]$key
hydro_id_ll <- level_table[level_table$name == hydro_name_ll, ]$key

level_ml <- level_table[level_table$name == hydro_name_ml, ]
level_ll <- level_table[level_table$name == hydro_name_ll, ]

forecast_ml <- get_future_flow_conditions(hydrometric = level_ml$relative_to_med, swe = basin_swe$relative_to_med, language = language$language)

forecast_ll <- get_future_flow_conditions(hydrometric = level_ll$relative_to_med, swe = basin_swe$relative_to_med, language = language$language)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The measured water surface elevation (relative to sea level) in Marsh Lake is currently" else "Le niveau d'eau (par rapport au niveau de la mer) du lac Marsh est"`
`r officer::ftext(level_ml$description, get_text_fmt(level_ml$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("(Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E1). The current snow and groundwater conditions suggest that water levels will be")
} else {
paste0("(figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E1). Les conditions d'enneigement actuelles et des eaux souterraines portent à croire que les niveaux d'eau seront ")
}`
`r officer::ftext(forecast_ml$description, get_text_fmt(forecast_ml$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en"){
paste0("this summer. However, weather conditions over the spring and summer will determine the peak water level in Marsh Lake, which typically occurs in late summer in response to peak glacial runoff and large precipitation events. Lake Laberge water surface elevation is currently ")
} else {
paste0(" cet été. Toutefois, les conditions météorologiques printanières et estivales détermineront le niveau d'eau maximal du lac Marsh, qui est habituellement atteint à la fin de l'été sous l'effet d'un ruissellement glaciaire maximal et  de fortes précipitations. Le niveau du lac Laberge est actuellement ")
}`
`r officer::ftext(level_ll$description, get_text_fmt(level_ll$text_colour))`
`r if(language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0(" (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E2). Lake Laberge follows a similar summer pattern to the upper Southern Lakes and is expected to experience ")
} else {
paste0(" (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E2). L’été, le lac Laberge suit une tendance semblable à celle observée dans la partie supérieure des lacs du Sud; on s’attend à un niveau d’eau ")}`
`r officer::ftext(forecast_ll$description, get_text_fmt(forecast_ll$text_colour))`
`r if(language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0(" water levels this summer.")
} else {
paste0(" cet été.")
}`

```{r MarshLake_levels, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.width=9, fig.height=fig.height_full}
# E1
# Set station ID

# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullWater(
      timeseries = dat$water_level$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(hydro_id_ml))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("level_", fmt_tr_key(hydro_name_ml))),
      parameter = "water level",
      subplot = "1",
      threshold = level_ml$threshold
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

```{r LakeLaberge_levels, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.width=9, fig.height=fig.height_full}
# E2

# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullWater(
      timeseries = dat$water_level$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(hydro_id_ll))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("level_", fmt_tr_key(hydro_name_ll))),
      parameter = "water level",
      subplot = "2",
      threshold = level_ll$threshold
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

# `r titles$TESLIN`

```{r Teslin, echo=FALSE}
if ("Teslin" %in% params$basins) {
  include <- TRUE
} else {
  include <- FALSE
}

basin_name <- "Teslin_Big_Salmon"

basin_swe <- basins_table[basins_table$name == basin_name, ]

met_name <- "Teslin ECCC Met"
met_id <- precip_table[precip_table$name == met_name, ]$key
precip <- precip_table[precip_table$key == met_id, ]
fdd <- fdd_table[fdd_table$key == met_id, ]
hydro_name <- "Teslin Lake At Teslin"
hydro_id <- level_table[level_table$name == hydro_name, ]$key
level <- level_table[level_table$name == hydro_name, ]
future <- get_future_flow_conditions(hydrometric = level$relative_to_med, swe = basin_swe$relative_to_med, language = language$language)
```


`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The Teslin / Big Salmon River Basin snowpack is " else "L’accumulation de neige dans le bassin de la rivière Teslin / Big Salmon est "`
`r officer::ftext(basin_swe$description , get_text_fmt(basin_swe$text_colour))`.
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("The basin-averaged Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) is estimated at **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", basin_swe$value, " mm** as of ", month_names[bulletin_month], " (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
} else {
paste0("Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], " l’EEN moyen du bassin est estimé à **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", basin_swe$value, " mm** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
}`

```{r TeslinBigSalmon_basin, echo=FALSE, eval=include, out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
# B
# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullSWE(
      timeseries = dat$swe$basins$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", basin_name)],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("basin_", fmt_tr_key(basin_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "Teslin precipitation has been" else "Les précipitations à Teslin ont été"`
`r officer::ftext(precip$description, get_text_fmt(precip$text_colour))` 
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("from October through ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C). Cumulative winter precipitation was **", precip$relative_to_med, "%** of normal on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1. Cumulative degree-days of freezing (CDDF) are **", fdd$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", fdd$value, "\u00B0C-Days** on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), which suggests ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), " on rivers and lakes of the region.")
} else {
paste0("d’octobre à ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C). Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], ", les précipitations hivernales cumulatives se chiffrent à **", precip$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, et les degrés-jours de gel cumulés à **", fdd$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", fdd$value, " \u00B0C-jours** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), ce qui laisse penser que l'épaisseur de glace sur les lacs et les cours d'eau de la région est ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), ".")
}`

```{r Teslin_weather, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))


tryCatch(
  {
    snowBullPrecip(
      timeseries = dat$precip$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)


# Plot D
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullCDDF(
      timeseries = dat$fdd$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name))),
      location_id = fdd$location
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The measured water surface elevation (relative to sea level) in Teslin Lake is currently" else "Le niveau d'eau (par rapport au niveau de la mer) du lac Teslin est"`
`r officer::ftext(level$description, get_text_fmt(level$text_colour))` 
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("(Figure ", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), " C). Teslin Lake typically peaks in late June and is predominantly snowmelt driven. The ",basin_swe$description," snowpack and ", level$description, " water level suggest that summer water levels will be ")} else{

paste0("(figure ", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), " E). Principalement influencé par la fonte des neiges, il atteint généralement son maximum vers la fin juin. L’accumulation de neige ", basin_swe$description, " et le niveau d’eau ", level$description, " laissent croire que les niveaux d’eau estivaux seront ")
}`
`r officer::ftext(future$description, get_text_fmt(future$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0(". Peak water levels will depend on spring weather patterns.")
} else {
paste0(". Les niveaux d’eau maximaux dépendront des conditions météorologiques printanières.")
}`

```{r TeslinLake, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.width=9, fig.height=fig.height_full}
# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullWater(
      timeseries = dat$water_level$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(hydro_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("level_", fmt_tr_key(hydro_name))),
      parameter = "water level",
      threshold = level$threshold
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

# `r titles$CENTRAL_YUKON`

```{r Central Yukon, echo=FALSE}
if ("Central Yukon" %in% params$basins) {
  include <- TRUE
} else {
  include <- FALSE
}

basin_name <- "Central_Yukon"
basin_swe <- basins_table[basins_table$name == basin_name, ]

met_name <- "Carmacks Airport"
hydro_name <- "Nordenskiold River Below Rowlinson Creek"

met_id <- precip_table[precip_table$name == met_name, ]$key

precip <- precip_table[precip_table$key == met_id, ]
fdd <- fdd_table[fdd_table$key == met_id, ]

hydro_id <- flow_table[flow_table$name == hydro_name, ]$key
flow <- flow_table[flow_table$key == hydro_id, ]

future <- get_future_flow_conditions(hydrometric = flow$relative_to_med, swe = basin_swe$relative_to_med, language = language$language)
```
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The Central Yukon River Basin snowpack is" else "L’accumulation de neige dans le bassin central du fleuve Yukon est"`
`r officer::ftext(basin_swe$description, get_text_fmt(basin_swe$text_colour))`.
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("The basin-averaged Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) is estimated to be **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", basin_swe$value, " mm** as of ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
} else {
paste0("Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], ", l'ÉEN moyen du bassin est estimé à **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", basin_swe$value, " mm** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
}`

```{r CentralYukon_basin, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
# B
# Plotting

tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullSWE(
      loc_name = trb(paste0("basin_", fmt_tr_key(basin_name))),
      timeseries = dat$swe$basins$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", basin_name)]
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "Carmacks precipitation has been" else "Les précipitations à Carmacks ont été"`
`r officer::ftext(precip$description, get_text_fmt(precip$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("from October through ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C). Cumulative winter precipitation was **", precip$relative_to_med, "%** of normal on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1. Cumulative degree-days of freezing (CDDF) are **", fdd$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", fdd$value, "\u00B0C-Days** on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), which suggests ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), " on rivers and lakes of the region.")
} else {
paste0("d'octobre à ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C). Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], ", les précipitations hivernales cumulatives se chiffrent à **", precip$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, et les degrés-jours de gel cumulés à **", fdd$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", fdd$value, " \u00B0C-jours** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), ce qui laisse penser que l'épaisseur de glace sur les lacs et les cours d'eau de la région est ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), ".")
}`

```{r Carmacks_weather, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))



tryCatch(
  {
    snowBullPrecip(
      timeseries = dat$precip$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)

# Plot D
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullCDDF(
      timeseries = dat$fdd$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name))),
      location_id = fdd$location
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The estimated Nordenskiold River discharge is currently" else "Le débit estimé de la rivière Nordenskiold est "`
`r officer::ftext(flow$description, get_text_fmt(flow$text_colour))` 
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("(Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). The ",basin_swe$description," snowpack combined with ",flow$description," winter flows in the watershed suggests spring freshet flow volumes will be ")} else{paste0("(figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). L’accumulation de neige ",basin_swe$description," combiné au débit hivernal ",flow$description," dans le bassin hydrographique porte à croire que le volume de ruissellement des crues printanières sera également  ")}`
`r officer::ftext(future$description, get_text_fmt(future$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0(". A combination of local conditions such as ice thickness, freeze-up levels, and current flow volumes suggest a  ------  average ice jam risk. Weather patterns leading up to breakup and spring freshet will play a critical role in determining potential ice jam severity and peak water levels.")
} else {
paste0(". Un ensemble de conditions locales, comme l’épaisseur de la glace, les niveaux de gel et les débits actuels, laisse croire à un risque de formation de glaces ------ la moyenne. Le scénario printanier dépendra des conditions météorologiques en mars et en avril.")
}`

```{r Nordenskiold, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.width=9, fig.height=fig.height_full}
# E
# Set station ID

# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullWater(
      timeseries = dat$water_flow$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(hydro_id))],
      parameter = "flow",
      loc_name = trb(paste0("flow_", fmt_tr_key(hydro_name))),
      threshold = flow$threshold
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

# `r titles$PELLY`

```{r Pelly, echo=FALSE}
if ("Pelly" %in% params$basins) {
  include <- TRUE
} else {
  include <- FALSE
}

basin_name <- "Pelly"
basin_swe <- basins_table[basins_table$name == basin_name, ]

pillow_name <- "Twin Creeks North Meteorological"
pillow_id <- pillows_table[pillows_table$name == pillow_name, ]$key
pillows <- pillows_table[pillows_table$name == pillow_name, ]

met_name <- "Faro ECCC Met"
met_id <- fdd_table[fdd_table$name == met_name, ]$key
fdd <- fdd_table[fdd_table$name == met_name, ]

hydro_name <- "Pelly River At Pelly Crossing"
hydro_id <- flow_table[flow_table$name == hydro_name, ]$key
flow <- flow_table[flow_table$key == hydro_id, ]

future <- get_future_flow_conditions(hydrometric = flow$relative_to_med, swe = basin_swe$relative_to_med, language = language$language)
```



`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The Pelly River Basin snowpack is" else "L’accumulation de neige dans le bassin de la rivière Pelly est"`
`r officer::ftext(basin_swe$description, get_text_fmt(basin_swe$text_colour))`.
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("At Twin Creeks Meteorological Station, Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) is estimated to be **", pillows$relative_to_med, "%** of normal (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "A). The Pelly River basin-averaged SWE is estimated to be **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", basin_swe$value, " mm** as of ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
} else {
paste0("À la station météorologique des ruisseaux Twin, l’EEN est estimé à **", pillows$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "A). Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], " l’EEN moyen du bassin est estimé à **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", basin_swe$value, " mm** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
}`

```{r Pelly_Snow, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
## A Twin Creeks
# Set station ID

# Plot SWE
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullpillow(
      timeseries = dat$swe$pillows$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(pillow_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(pillow_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)

# Plot SWE
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullSWE(
      loc_name = trb(paste0("basin_", fmt_tr_key(basin_name))),
      timeseries = dat$swe$basins$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", basin_name)]
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```


`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "There are no precipitation data available at Faro but the snowpack data indicate that winter precipitation has been" else "Il n’y a pas de données de précipitations pour Faro, mais les données sur l’accumulation de neige indiquent que les conditions sont"`
`r officer::ftext(basin_swe$description, get_text_fmt(basin_swe$text_colour))`. 
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("Cumulative degree-days of freezing (CDDF) are **", fdd$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", fdd$value, "\u00B0C-Days** on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C), which suggests ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), " on rivers and lakes of the region.")
} else {
paste0("Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], " les degrés-jours de gel cumulés sont à **", fdd$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", fdd$value, " \u00B0C-jours**  (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), ce qui laisse penser que l'épaisseur de glace sur les lacs et les cours d'eau de la région est ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), ".")
}`

```{r Faro_CDDF, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
# Create plot D
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullCDDF(
      timeseries = dat$fdd$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name))),
      location_id = fdd$location
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The estimated Pelly River discharge at Pelly Crossing is currently" else "Le débit estimé de la rivière Pelly à Pelly Crossing est "`
`r officer::ftext(flow$description, get_text_fmt(flow$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("(Figure ", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). The ",basin_swe$description," snowpack combined with ",flow$description," winter flows in the watershed suggests spring freshet flow volumes will be")} else {paste0("(figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). L’accumulation de neige ",basin_swe$description,", combinée au débit hivernal ",flow$description," dans le bassin hydrographique, porte à croire que le volume de ruissellement des crues printanières sera ")}`
`r officer::ftext(future$description, get_text_fmt(future$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") 
{paste0(". Weather patterns leading up to breakup and spring freshet will play a critical role in determining potential ice jam severity and peak water levels.")
} else {paste0(". Le scénario printanier dépendra des conditions météorologiques en mars et en avril.")}`

```{r PellyRiver, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.width=9, fig.height=fig.height_full}
# E
# Set station ID

# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullWater(
      timeseries = dat$water_flow$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(hydro_id))],
      parameter = "flow",
      loc_name = trb(paste0("flow_", fmt_tr_key(hydro_name))),
      threshold = flow$threshold
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

# `r titles$STEWART`

```{r Stewart, echo=FALSE}
if ("Stewart" %in% params$basins) {
  include <- TRUE
} else {
  include <- FALSE
}

basin_name <- "Stewart"
pillow_name <- "Withers Lake Meteorological"

pillow_id <- pillows_table[pillows_table$name == pillow_name, ]$key
basin_swe <- basins_table[basins_table$name == basin_name, ]
pillows <- pillows_table[pillows_table$key == pillow_id, ]

met_name <- "Mayo ECCC Met"
met_id <- precip_table[precip_table$name == met_name, ]$key

precip <- precip_table[precip_table$key == met_id, ]
fdd <- fdd_table[fdd_table$key == met_id, ]

hydro_name <- "Stewart River At The Mouth"
hydro_id <- flow_table[flow_table$name == hydro_name, ]$key
flow <- flow_table[flow_table$key == hydro_id, ]

future <- get_future_flow_conditions(hydrometric = flow$relative_to_med, swe = basin_swe$relative_to_med, language = language$language)
```


`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The Stewart River Basin snowpack is" else "L’accumulation de neige dans le bassin de la rivière Stewart est"`
`r officer::ftext(basin_swe$description, get_text_fmt(basin_swe$text_colour))`.
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("At Withers Lake Meteorological Station, Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) is estimated to be **", pillows$relative_to_med, "%** of normal (Figure ", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), " A). The basin-averaged SWE is estimated to be **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", basin_swe$value, " mm** as of ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
} else {
paste0("À la station météorologique du lac Withers, l’EEN est estimé à **", pillows$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "A). Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], " l’EEN moyen du bassin est estimé à **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", basin_swe$value, " mm** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
}`

```{r StewartRiver_Snow, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
## A Withers Lake
# Set station ID


# Plot SWE
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullpillow(
      timeseries = dat$swe$pillows$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(pillow_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(pillow_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)

# B
# Plotting

tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullSWE(
      loc_name = trb(paste0("basin_", fmt_tr_key(basin_name))),
      timeseries = dat$swe$basins$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", basin_name)]
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```


`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "Mayo precipitation has been" else "Les précipitations à Mayo ont été"`
`r officer::ftext(precip$description, get_text_fmt(precip$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("from October through ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C). Cumulative winter precipitation was **", precip$relative_to_med, "%** of normal on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1. Cumulative degree-days of freezing (CDDF) are **", fdd$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", fdd$value, "\u00B0C-Days** on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), which suggests ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), " on rivers and lakes of the region.")
} else {
paste0("d’octobre à ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C). Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], ", les précipitations hivernales cumulatives se chiffrent à **", precip$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, et les degrés-jours de gel cumulés à **", fdd$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", fdd$value, " \u00B0C-jours** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), ce qui laisse penser que l'épaisseur de glace sur les lacs et les cours d'eau de la région est ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), ".")
}`

```{r Mayo_weather, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
# Create plot c

tryCatch(
  {
    snowBullPrecip(
      timeseries = dat$precip$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
# Create plot D
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullCDDF(
      timeseries = dat$fdd$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The estimated Stewart River discharge at the outlet is currently" else "Le débit estimé à l'embouchure de la rivière Stewart est"`
`r officer::ftext(flow$description, get_text_fmt(flow$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("(Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). The ",basin_swe$description," snowpack combined with ",flow$description," winter flows in the watershed suggests spring freshet flow volumes will be ")} else {paste0("L’accumulation de neige ",basin_swe$description,", combinée au débit hivernal ",flow$description," dans le bassin hydrographique, porte à croire que le volume de ruissellement des crues printanières sera ")}`
`r officer::ftext(future$description, get_text_fmt(future$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0(". Weather patterns leading to breakup and the spring freshet will play a critical role in determining potential ice jam severity and peak water levels.")} else {
paste0(" (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). Le scénario printanier dépendra des conditions météorologiques en mars et en avril.")
}`

```{r StewartRiver, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.width=9, fig.height=fig.height_full}
# E
# Set station ID

# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullWater(
      timeseries = dat$water_flow$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(hydro_id))],
      parameter = "flow",
      loc_name = trb(paste0("flow_", fmt_tr_key(hydro_name))),
      threshold = flow$threshold
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

# `r titles$WHITE`

```{r White, echo=FALSE}
if ("White" %in% params$basins) {
  include <- TRUE
} else {
  include <- FALSE
}

basin_name <- "White"
hydro_name <- "White River At Km 1881.6 Alaska Highway"

hydro_id <- flow_table[flow_table$name == hydro_name, ]$key
flow <- flow_table[flow_table$key == hydro_id, ]
basin_swe <- basins_table[basins_table$name == basin_name, ]

future <- get_future_flow_conditions(hydrometric = flow$relative_to_med, swe = basin_swe$relative_to_med, language = language$language)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The White River Basin snowpack is" else "L’accumulation de neige dans le bassin de la rivière White est"`
`r officer::ftext(basin_swe$description, get_text_fmt(basin_swe$text_colour))`. 
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("The basin-averaged Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) is estimated to be **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", basin_swe$value, " mm** as of ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
} else {
paste0("Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], ", l'ÉEN moyen du bassin est estimé à **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", basin_swe$value, " mm** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
}`

```{r White_basin, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
# B
# Plotting

tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullSWE(
      loc_name = trb(paste0("basin_", fmt_tr_key(basin_name))),
      timeseries = dat$swe$basins$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", basin_name)]
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```



`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The estimated White River discharge at the Alaska Highway is currently" else "Le débit estimé de la rivière White à la route de l’Alaska est"`
`r officer::ftext(flow$description, get_text_fmt(flow$text_colour))` 
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("(Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). In this watershed, high flows are dominated by mountain snowmelt and glacial melt that are largely influenced by summer temperatures and precipitation. The ",basin_swe$description," snowpack combined with ,", flow$description, " winter flows suggests spring freshet flow volumes will be ")} else{paste0("(figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). Dans ce bassin hydrographique, les débits élevés sont dominés par la fonte des neiges en montagne et des glaciers, qui sont largement influencés par les températures et les précipitations estivales. L’accumulation de neige ", basin_swe$description, ", combinée au débit hivernal ", flow$description, ", porte à croire que le volume de ruissellement des crues printanières sera ")}`
`r officer::ftext(future$description, get_text_fmt(future$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {paste0(". Weather conditions over the spring and summer will determine peak flows.")
} else {
 paste0(". Les conditions météorologiques au printemps et en été détermineront les débits de pointes.")
}`

```{r WhiteRiver, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.width=9, fig.height=fig.height_full}
# E
# Set station ID

# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullWater(
      timeseries = dat$water_flow$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(hydro_id))],
      parameter = "flow",
      loc_name = trb(paste0("flow_", fmt_tr_key(hydro_name))),
      threshold = flow$threshold
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

# `r titles$LOWER_YUKON`

```{r Lower Yukon, echo=FALSE}
if ("Lower Yukon" %in% params$basins) {
  include <- TRUE
} else {
  include <- FALSE
}

basin_name <- "Lower_Yukon"
pillow_name <- "King Solomon Dome Meteorological"
pillow_id <- pillows_table[pillows_table$name == pillow_name, ]$key

basin_swe <- basins_table[basins_table$name == basin_name, ]
pillows <- pillows_table[pillows_table$key == pillow_id, ]

met_name <- "Dawson City ECCC Met"
met_id <- precip_table[precip_table$name == met_name, ]$key

precip <- precip_table[precip_table$key == met_id, ]
fdd <- fdd_table[fdd_table$key == met_id, ]

hydro_name_wh <- "Yukon River Above White River"
hydro_name_kl <- "Klondike River Above Bonanza Creek"
hydro_id_wh <- flow_table[flow_table$name == hydro_name_wh, ]$key
hydro_id_kl <- flow_table[flow_table$name == hydro_name_kl, ]$key
flow_white <- flow_table[flow_table$key == hydro_id_wh, ]
flow_klondike <- flow_table[flow_table$key == hydro_id_kl, ]


future_wh <- get_future_flow_conditions(hydrometric = flow_white$relative_to_med, swe = basin_swe$relative_to_med, language = language$language)
future_kl <- get_future_flow_conditions(hydrometric = flow_klondike$relative_to_med, swe = basin_swe$relative_to_med, language = language$language)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The Lower Yukon River Basin snowpack is" else "L’accumulation de neige dans le bassin inférieur du fleuve Yukon est"`
`r officer::ftext(basin_swe$description, get_text_fmt(basin_swe$text_colour))`. 
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("Established in 2022, King Solomon Dome Meteorological Station registered Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) at **", pillows$relative_to_med, "%** of normal when compared with the manual snow survey record for that site (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "A). The basin-averaged SWE is estimated to be **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, "%**
of normal, with **", basin_swe$value, " mm** as of ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
} else {
paste0("Installée en 2022, la station météorologique du dôme King Solomon a enregistré un ÉEN de **", pillows$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale par rapport aux relevés nivométriques manuels pour cet emplacement (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "A). Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], " l’EEN moyen du bassin est estimé à **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", basin_swe$value, " mm** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
}`

```{r LowerYukonRiver_Snow, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

## A King Solomon Dome
tryCatch(
  {
    if (language$abbrev == "fr") {
      snowbullpillow2(location_pil = 85, location_surv = 136, custom_title = "A : Équivalent en eau de la neige - dôme King Solomon")
    } else {
      snowbullpillow2(location_pil = 85, location_surv = 136, custom_title = "A: King Solomon Dome Snow Water Equivalent")
    }
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)

# B
# Plotting

tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullSWE(
      loc_name = trb(paste0("basin_", fmt_tr_key(basin_name))),
      timeseries = dat$swe$basins$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", basin_name)]
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "Precipitation at Dawson Airport has been " else "Les précipitations à l’aéroport de Dawson ont été"`
`r officer::ftext(precip$description, get_text_fmt(precip$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("from October through ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D). Cumulative winter precipitation was **", precip$relative_to_med, "%** of normal on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1. Cumulative degree-days of freezing (CDDF) are **", fdd$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", fdd$value, "\u00B0C-Days** on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), which suggests ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), " on rivers and lakes of the region.")
} else {
paste0("d’octobre à ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C). Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], ", les précipitations hivernales cumulatives se chiffrent à **", precip$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, et les degrés-jours de gel cumulés à **", fdd$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", fdd$value, " \u00B0C-jours** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), ce qui laisse penser que l'épaisseur de glace sur les lacs et les cours d'eau de la région est ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), ".")
}`

```{r Dawson_weather_plots, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
# Create plot C

tryCatch(
  {
    snowBullPrecip(
      timeseries = dat$precip$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)

# Create plot D
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullCDDF(
      timeseries = dat$fdd$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The estimated Yukon River discharge above White River is currently" else "Le débit estimé du fleuve Yukon en amont de la rivière White est"`
`r officer::ftext(flow_white$description, get_text_fmt(flow_white$text_colour))` 
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "(Figure E1) while the estimated Klondike River discharge above Bonanza Creek is currently" else "(figure E1) tandis que le débit de la rivière Klondike en amont du ruisseau Bonanza est"`
`r officer::ftext(flow_klondike$description, get_text_fmt(flow_klondike$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("(Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E2). The ",basin_swe$description," snowpack combined with ",flow_klondike$description," winter flows suggests spring freshet flow volumes will be")} else{
paste0("(figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E2). L'accumulation de neige ",basin_swe$description," en amont, combinée au débit hivernal ",flow_klondike$description," , porte à croire que le volume de ruissellement des crues printanières sera ")}`
`r officer::ftext(future_kl$description, get_text_fmt(future_kl$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {paste0(
". Weather patterns leading up to breakup and spring freshet will play a critical role in determining potential ice jam severity and peak water levels.")
} else {
paste0(". Les conditions météorologiques qui précéderont la débâcle et les crues printanières exerceront une influence décisive sur les niveaux d’eau maximaux et la gravité d’un éventuel embâcle.")}`

```{r YukonRiver, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.width=9, fig.height=fig.height_full}
# E1
# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullWater(
      timeseries = dat$water_flow$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(hydro_id_wh))],
      parameter = "flow",
      loc_name = trb(paste0("flow_", fmt_tr_key(hydro_name_wh))),
      subplot = "1",
      threshold = flow_white$threshold
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)


# E2
# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullWater(
      timeseries = dat$water_flow$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(hydro_id_kl))],
      parameter = "flow",
      loc_name = trb(paste0("flow_", fmt_tr_key(hydro_name_kl))),
      subplot = "2",
      threshold = flow_klondike$threshold
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

# `r titles$PORCUPINE`

```{r Porcupine, echo=FALSE}
if ("Porcupine" %in% params$basins) {
  include <- TRUE
} else {
  include <- FALSE
}

basin_name <- "Porcupine"
basin_swe <- basins_table[basins_table$name == "Porcupine", ]

met_name <- "Old Crow ECCC met"
met_id <- precip_table[precip_table$name == met_name, ]$key
precip <- precip_table[precip_table$key == met_id, ]
fdd <- fdd_table[fdd_table$key == met_id, ]

hydro_name <- "Porcupine River Near International Boundary"
hydro_id <- flow_table[flow_table$name == hydro_name, ]$key
flow <- flow_table[flow_table$key == hydro_id, ]

future <- get_future_flow_conditions(hydrometric = flow$relative_to_med, swe = basin_swe$relative_to_med, language = language$language)
```



`r if (is.na(basin_swe$display_value)) {
  if (language$abbrev == "en") {
    paste0("The Porcupine River Basin snowpack cannot be estimated for March 1 due to a lack of data (Figure B). Avalanches on the Dempster Highway prevented access to key basin snow courses. However, the Old Crow snow survey returned a snowpack of 102% of normal and climate modelling suggests close to normal snowpack for the basin. ")
  } else {
    paste0("L'accumulation de neige dans le bassin de la rivière Porcupine ne peut être estimée au 1^er^ mars en raison d'une insuffisance de données (figure B). Des avalanches sur l'autoroute Dempster ont rendu l'accès aux principaux relevés nivométriques du bassin impossible. Cependant, le relevé nivométrique d'Old Crow a montré une accumulation de neige de 102% de la normale, et la modélisation climatique laisse supposer une accumulation de neige près de la normale pour le bassin.")
  }
}
`

<!-- `r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The Porcupine River Basin snowpack is" else "L’accumulation de neige dans le bassin de la rivière Porcupine est"`
`r officer::ftext(basin_swe$description, get_text_fmt(basin_swe$text_colour))`.
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("The basin-averaged Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) is estimated to be **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", basin_swe$value, " mm** as of ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
} else {
paste0("Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], ", l'ÉEN moyen du bassin est estimé à **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", basin_swe$value, " mm** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
}` -->

```{r Porcupine_basin, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
# B
# Plotting

tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullSWE(
      loc_name = trb(paste0("basin_", fmt_tr_key(basin_name))),
      timeseries = dat$swe$basins$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", basin_name)]
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "Precipitation at Old Crow Airport has been " else "Les précipitations à l’aéroport d’Old Crow ont été"`
`r officer::ftext(precip$description, get_text_fmt(precip$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("from October through ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C). Cumulative winter precipitation was **", precip$relative_to_med, "%** of normal on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1. Cumulative degree-days of freezing (CDDF) are **", fdd$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", fdd$value, "\u00B0C-Days** on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), which suggests ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), " on rivers and lakes of the region.")
} else {
paste0("d’octobre à ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C). Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], ", les précipitations hivernales cumulatives se chiffrent à **", precip$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, et les degrés-jours de gel cumulés à **", fdd$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", fdd$value, " \u00B0C-jours** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), ce qui laisse penser que l'épaisseur de glace sur les lacs et les cours d'eau de la région est ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), ".")
}`

```{r OldCrow_weather, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

tryCatch(
  {
    snowBullPrecip(
      timeseries = dat$precip$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)

# Create plot D
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullCDDF(
      timeseries = dat$fdd$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```


`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The estimated Porcupine River discharge is currently" else "Le débit estimé de la rivière Porcupine est"`
`r officer::ftext(flow$description, get_text_fmt(flow$text_colour))` 

`r if (is.na(basin_swe$display_value)) {
  if (language$abbrev == "en") {
    paste0(". April 1 snowpack data in combination with winter flows will make estimates of spring freshet possible for the next bulletin. Weather patterns leading to breakup and the spring freshet will play a critical role in determining potential ice jam severity and peak water levels")
  } else {
    paste0(". Les données d’accumulation de neige du 1^er^ avril, combinées aux débits hivernaux, permettront d’estimer les crues printanières dans le prochain bulletin. Les conditions météorologiques qui précéderont la débâcle et les crues printanières exerceront une influence décisive sur les niveaux d’eau maximaux et la gravité d’un éventuel embâcle.")
  }
}
`

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The estimated Porcupine River discharge is currently" else "Le débit estimé de la rivière Porcupine est"`
`r officer::ftext(flow$description, get_text_fmt(flow$text_colour))` 
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("(Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). The available data suggest that the snowpack is ", basin_swe$description, " snowpack and will result in ")} else{paste0("(figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). L’accumulation de neige ", basin_swe$description, ", combinée au débit hivernal ", flow$description, ", porte à croire que le volume de ruissellement des crues printanières sera ")}`
`r officer::ftext(future$description, get_text_fmt(future$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {paste0( " freshet flows. April 1 snowpack data in combination with winter flows will make estimates of spring freshet scenarios possible for the next bulletin. Weather patterns leading to breakup and the spring freshet will play a critical role in determining potential ice jam severity and peak water levels.")} else{paste0(". Les conditions météorologiques qui précéderont la débâcle et les crues printanières exerceront une influence décisive sur les niveaux d’eau maximaux et la gravité d’un éventuel embâcle.")}`

```{r PorcupineRiver, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.width=9, fig.height=fig.height_full}
# E
# Set station ID


# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullWater(
      timeseries = dat$water_flow$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(hydro_id))],
      parameter = "flow",
      loc_name = trb(paste0("flow_", fmt_tr_key(hydro_name))),
      threshold = flow$threshold
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

# `r titles$PEEL`

```{r Peel, echo=FALSE}
if ("Peel" %in% params$basins) {
  include <- TRUE
} else {
  include <- FALSE
}

basin_name <- "Peel"
basin_swe <- basins_table[basins_table$name == basin_name, ]

hydro_name <- "Peel River Above Canyon Creek"
hydro_id <- flow_table[flow_table$name == hydro_name, ]$key
flow <- flow_table[flow_table$key == hydro_id, ]

future <- get_future_flow_conditions(hydrometric = flow$relative_to_med, swe = basin_swe$relative_to_med, language = language$language)
```


`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The Peel River Basin snowpack is" else "L’accumulation de neige dans le bassin de la rivière Peel est"`
`r officer::ftext(basin_swe$description, get_text_fmt(basin_swe$text_colour))`.
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("The basin-averaged Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) is estimated to be **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", basin_swe$value, " mm** as of ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
} else {
paste0("Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], ", l'ÉEN moyen du bassin est estimé à **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", basin_swe$value, " mm** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
}`

```{r Peel_basin, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
# B
# Plotting

tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullSWE(
      loc_name = trb(paste0("basin_", fmt_tr_key(basin_name))),
      timeseries = dat$swe$basins$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", basin_name)]
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The estimated Peel River discharge is" else "Le débit estimé de la rivière Peel est"`
`r officer::ftext(flow$description, get_text_fmt(flow$text_colour))` 
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("(Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). The ", basin_swe$description, " snowpack combined with ", flow$description, " winter flows suggests spring freshet flow volumes will be ")} else {
paste0("(figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). L’accumulation de neige ", basin_swe$description, ", combinée au débit hivernal ", flow$description, ", porte à croire que le volume de ruissellement des crues printanières sera ")}`
`r officer::ftext(future$description, get_text_fmt(future$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0(". Weather conditions in March and April will determine the most probable spring scenario.")} else {
paste0(". Le scénario printanier dépendra des conditions météorologiques en mars et en avril.")}`

```{r PeelRiver, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.width=9, fig.height=fig.height_full}
# E
# Set station ID

# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullWater(
      timeseries = dat$water_flow$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(hydro_id))],
      parameter = "flow",
      loc_name = trb(paste0("flow_", fmt_tr_key(hydro_name))),
      threshold = flow$threshold
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

# `r titles$LIARD`

```{r Liard, echo=FALSE}
if ("Liard" %in% params$basins) {
  include <- TRUE
} else {
  include <- FALSE
}

basin_name <- "Liard"
pillow_name <- "Hyland North Meteorological"
pillow_id <- pillows_table[pillows_table$name == pillow_name, ]$key
pillow <- pillows_table[pillows_table$key == pillow_id, ]
basin_swe <- basins_table[basins_table$name == basin_name, ]

met_name <- "Watson Lake ECCC Met"
met_id <- precip_table[precip_table$name == met_name, ]$key
precip <- precip_table[precip_table$key == met_id, ]
fdd <- fdd_table[fdd_table$key == met_id, ]

hydro_name <- "Liard River At Upper Crossing"
hydro_id <- flow_table[flow_table$name == hydro_name, ]$key
flow <- flow_table[flow_table$key == hydro_id, ]

future <- get_future_flow_conditions(hydrometric = flow$relative_to_med, swe = basin_swe$relative_to_med, language = language$language)
```


`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The Liard River Basin snowpack is" else "L’accumulation de neige dans le bassin de la rivière Liard est"`
`r officer::ftext(basin_swe$description, get_text_fmt(basin_swe$text_colour))`.
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("At Hyland Meteorological Station, Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) is estimated to be **", pillow$relative_to_med, "%** of normal (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "A). The basin-averaged SWE is estimated to be **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", basin_swe$value, " mm** as of ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
} else {
paste0("À la station météorologique Hyland, l’EEN est estimé à **", pillow$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "A). Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], ", l'ÉEN moyen du bassin est estimé à **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", basin_swe$value, " mm** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
}`

```{r LiardRiver_Snow, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

## A Hyland River
# Plot SWE
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullpillow(
      timeseries = dat$swe$pillows$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(pillow_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(pillow_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)

# B
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullSWE(
      loc_name = trb(paste0("basin_", fmt_tr_key(basin_name))),
      timeseries = dat$swe$basins$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", basin_name)]
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "Precipitation at Watson Lake Airport has been " else "Les précipitations à l’aéroport de Watson Lake ont été"`
`r officer::ftext(precip$description, get_text_fmt(precip$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("from October through ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C). Cumulative winter precipitation was **", precip$relative_to_med, "%** of normal on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1. Cumulative degree-days of freezing (CDDF) are **", fdd$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", fdd$value, "\u00B0C-Days** on ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), which suggests ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), " on rivers and lakes of the region.")
} else {
paste0("d’octobre à ", month_names[bulletin_month-1], " (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "C). Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], ", les précipitations hivernales cumulatives se chiffrent à **", precip$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, et les degrés-jours de gel cumulés à **", fdd$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", fdd$value, " \u00B0C-jours** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "D), ce qui laisse penser que l'épaisseur de glace sur les lacs et les cours d'eau de la région est ", iceThickness(fdd$relative_to_med), ".")
}`


```{r WatsonLake_weather, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

tryCatch(
  {
    snowBullPrecip(
      timeseries = dat$precip$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)


# Create plot D
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullCDDF(
      timeseries = dat$fdd$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(met_id))],
      loc_name = trb(paste0("met_", fmt_tr_key(met_name)))
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The estimated Liard River discharge at Upper Liard is currently" else "Le débit estimé de la rivière Liard à Upper Liard est"`
`r officer::ftext(flow$description, get_text_fmt(flow$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("(Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). The ",basin_swe$description," snowpack in the watershed combined with ", flow$description, " winter flows suggests spring freshet flows and levels will be ")} else{
paste0("(figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). L’accumulation de neige ",basin_swe$description," dans le bassin, combinée au débit hivernal ", flow$description, ", porte à croire que le volume de ruissellement des crues printanières sera")}`
`r officer::ftext(future$description, get_text_fmt(future$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {paste0(". Weather conditions in March and April will determine the most probable spring scenario.")
} else {paste0(". Les conditions météorologiques qui précéderont la débâcle et les crues printanières exerceront une influence décisive sur les niveaux d’eau maximaux et la gravité d’un éventuel embâcle.")}`

```{r LiardRiver, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.width=9, fig.height=fig.height_full}
# E
# Set station ID

tryCatch(
  {
    # Plotting
    snowbullWater(
      timeseries = dat$water_flow$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(hydro_id))],
      parameter = "flow",
      loc_name = trb(paste0("flow_", fmt_tr_key(hydro_name))),
      threshold = flow$threshold
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

# `r titles$ALSEK`

```{r Alsek, echo=FALSE}
if ("Alsek" %in% params$basins) {
  include <- TRUE
} else {
  include <- FALSE
}

basin_name <- "Alsek"
basin_swe <- basins_table[basins_table$name == basin_name, ]

hydro_name <- "Alsek River Above Bates River"
hydro_id <- flow_table[flow_table$name == hydro_name, ]$key
flow <- flow_table[flow_table$key == hydro_id, ]

future <- get_future_flow_conditions(hydrometric = flow$relative_to_med, swe = basin_swe$relative_to_med, language = language$language)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The Alsek River Basin snowpack is" else "L’accumulation de neige dans le bassin du fleuve Alsek est"`
`r officer::ftext(basin_swe$description, get_text_fmt(basin_swe$text_colour))`.
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("The basin-averaged Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) is estimated to be **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, "%** of normal, with **", basin_swe$value, " mm** as of ", month_names[bulletin_month], " 1 (Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
} else {
paste0("Au 1^er^ ", month_names[bulletin_month], ", l'ÉEN moyen du bassin est estimé à **", basin_swe$relative_to_med, knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "%** de la normale, soit **", basin_swe$value, " mm** (figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "B).")
}`

```{r Alsek_basin, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.show='hold', out.width="50%", fig.height=fig.height_half}
# B
# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullSWE(
      loc_name = trb(paste0("basin_", fmt_tr_key(basin_name))),
      timeseries = dat$swe$basins$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", basin_name)]
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

`r if (language$abbrev == "en") "The estimated Alsek River discharge is currently" else "Le débit estimé du fleuve Alsek est"`
`r officer::ftext(flow$description, get_text_fmt(flow$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("(Figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). High flows in this watershed are dominated by mountain snowmelt and glacial melt that are largely influenced by summer temperatures and precipitation. The snowpack in the St. Elias Range is likely to generate ")
} else {
paste0("(figure", knitr::asis_output("\U00A0"), "E). Les débits élevés dans ce bassin sont dominés par la fonte des neiges de montagne et des glaciers, qui sont largement influencées par les températures estivales et les précipitations. L'accumulation de neige dans les monts St. Elias entrainera vraisemblablement des volumes de crue")
}`
`r officer::ftext(future$description, get_text_fmt(future$text_colour))`
`r if (language$abbrev == "en") {
paste0("freshet volumes. Weather conditions over the spring and summer will determine peak flows."
) } else {
paste0(" . Les conditions météorologiques au printemps et en été détermineront les débits de pointe")
}`


```{r AlsekRiver, echo=FALSE, eval=include, fig.width=9, fig.height=fig.height_full}
# E
# Set station ID


# Plotting
tryCatch(
  {
    snowbullWater(
      timeseries = dat$water_flow$timeseries$data[, c("datetime", as.character(hydro_id))],
      parameter = "flow",
      loc_name = trb(paste0("flow_", fmt_tr_key(hydro_name))),
      threshold = flow$threshold
    )
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Plot generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

# `r titles$TABLE`

```{r table, fig.width=10, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
tryCatch(
  {
    tabl <- create_survey_summary(con = con, year = bulletin_year, month = bulletin_month)
    # Round values
    tabl$elevation <- round(as.numeric(tabl$elevation), 0)
    tabl$depth <- round(tabl$depth, 0)
    tabl$swe <- round(tabl$swe, 0)
    tabl$swe_prevyear <- round(tabl$swe_prevyear, 0)
    tabl$swe_med <- round(tabl$swe_med, 0)

    # Truncate the strings in column 4 to remove the year from the date
    tabl$sample_date <- as.character(tabl$sample_date)
    tabl$sample_date <- substr(tabl$sample_date, 6, 10)

    # Add a column for the percent of median SWE
    tabl$relative_to_med <- round(tabl$swe / tabl$swe_med * 100, 0)

    # Add R next to record swe
    if (length(tabl[tabl$record_flag, ]$swe) > 0) {
      tabl[tabl$record_flag, ]$swe <- paste0(tabl[tabl$record_flag, ]$swe, " R")
    }
    # Add E next to estimated swe
    if (length(tabl[tabl$estimate_flag, ]$swe) > 0) {
      tabl[tabl$estimate_flag, ]$swe <- paste0(tabl[tabl$estimate_flag, ]$swe, " E")
    }
    # Add B next to swe outside of sampling period
    if (length(tabl[tabl$date_flag, ]$swe) > 0) {
      tabl[tabl$date_flag, ]$swe <- paste0(tabl[tabl$date_flag, ]$swe, " B")
    }
    # Remove geometry column if present
    if ("geometry" %in% names(tabl)) {
      tabl$geometry <- NULL
    }

    # Add C next to columns 'years' and 'swe_med' for composite stations
    # tabl[tabl$location_id %in% c("10AD-SC01B", "09BA-SC02B", "09AB-SC02B"), c("swe_med")] <- paste0(tabl[tabl$location_id %in% c("10AD-SC01B", "09BA-SC02B", "09AB-SC02B"), c("swe_med")], " C")
    # tabl[tabl$location_id %in% c("10AD-SC01B", "09BA-SC02B", "09AB-SC02B"), c("years")] <- paste0(tabl[tabl$location_id %in% c("10AD-SC01B", "09BA-SC02B", "09AB-SC02B"), c("years")], " C")
    # Handle composite station indicators
    tabl$composite_flag <- grepl("\\(composite\\)", tabl[["location_name"]])
    tabl$years <- as.character(tabl$years)
    tabl$swe_med <- as.character(tabl$swe_med)
    tabl$swe_med <- ifelse(tabl$composite_flag, paste0(tabl$swe_med, " C"), tabl$swe_med)
    tabl$years <- ifelse(tabl$composite_flag, paste0(tabl$years, " C"), tabl$years)
    tabl$composite_flag <- NULL

    #### French version versus English version of table ####
    if (language$abbrev == "fr") {
      # A.R. to not surveyed cells (empty 'sample_date' or 'swe_prevyear')
      tabl$sample_date[is.na(tabl$sample_date)] <- "A.R."
      tabl$swe_prevyear[is.na(tabl$swe_prevyear)] <- "A.R."

      # Subset to columns of interest
      tabl <- tabl[, c("location_name_fr", "location", "elevation", "sample_date", "depth", "swe", "relative_to_med", "swe_prevyear", "swe_med", "years", "sub_basin")]
      # Rename columns
      colnames(tabl) <- c("Nom", "Code", "Élévation (m)", "Date du relevé (mm-jj)", "Épaisseur de neige (cm)", "Équivalent en eau (ÉEN, mm)", "% de l'ÉEN médian", "Année dernière (ÉEN, mm)", "ÉEN médian historique (mm)", "Nombre d'années avec données", "sub_basin")
      size <- 9
      wdth <- c(1.3, 0.8, 0.7, 0.6, 0.7, 0.7, 0.6)

      # Remove 'Parcours nivométrique' from name
      tabl[, 1] <- sub(" \\(parcours nivométrique\\)", "", tabl[, 1])
      tabl[, 1] <- sub(" \\(parcours nivométrique, composite\\)", "", tabl[, 1])
      tabl[, 1] <- sub(" \\(parcours nivométrique composite\\)", "", tabl[, 1])

      # Capitalize first letter of location name
      tabl[, 1] <- paste0(toupper(substr(tabl$Nom, 1, 1)), substr(tabl$Nom, 2, nchar(tabl$Nom)))
    } else {
      # N.S to not surveyed cells (empty 'sample_date' or 'swe_prevyear')
      tabl$sample_date[is.na(tabl$sample_date)] <- "N.S."
      tabl$swe_prevyear[is.na(tabl$swe_prevyear)] <- "N.S."
      # Subset to columns of interest
      tabl <- tabl[, c("location_name", "location", "elevation", "sample_date", "depth", "swe", "relative_to_med", "swe_prevyear", "swe_med", "years", "sub_basin")]
      colnames(tabl) <- c("Name", "Identifier", "Elevation (m)", "Date of Survey (mm-dd)", "Snow depth (cm)", "Water content (SWE) (mm)", "% of median SWE", "Last year SWE (mm)", "Median historical SWE (mm)", "Years of record", "sub_basin")
      size <- 9
      wdth <- c(1.2, 0.8, 0.7, 0.7, 0.7, 0.7, 0.6)

      # Remove '(composite)' from name
      tabl[, 1] <- gsub(" \\(composite\\)", "", tabl[, 1])
      # Remove 'Snow Course' from name
      tabl[, 1] <- sub(" Snow Course", "", tabl[, 1])
    }

    # Remove 'A' and 'B' from name (years of record has 'C' for composite stations)
    tabl[, 1] <- sub(" (A|B)(?= |$)", "", tabl[, 1], perl = TRUE)

    #### Set up basin names ####
    # Order rows
    target <- c("Upper_Yukon", "Teslin_Big_Salmon", "Central_Yukon", "Pelly", "Stewart", "White", "Lower_Yukon", "Porcupine", "Peel", "Liard", "Alsek", "Alaska")


    tabl <- tabl %>% dplyr::arrange(factor(sub_basin, levels = target), factor(if (language$abbrev == "fr") Code else Identifier))

    ## Change basin names
    # Add River Basin to names
    tabl$sub_basin <- paste0(tabl$sub_basin, " River Basin")
    # Replace all _ with space
    tabl$sub_basin <- gsub("_", " ", tabl$sub_basin)
    tabl$sub_basin <- gsub("Alaska River Basin", "Coastal South-East Alaska Snow Courses", tabl$sub_basin)

    # Manually replace french names
    if (language$abbrev == "fr") {
      tabl <- tabl %>%
        dplyr::mutate(sub_basin = dplyr::case_when(
          sub_basin == "Upper Yukon River Basin" ~ "Bassin supérieur du fleuve Yukon",
          sub_basin == "Teslin Big Salmon River Basin" ~ "Bassin des rivières Teslin et Big Salmon", # Example replacement
          sub_basin == "Central Yukon River Basin" ~ "Bassin central du fleuve Yukon", # Example replacement
          sub_basin == "Pelly River Basin" ~ "Bassin de la rivière Pelly",
          sub_basin == "Stewart River Basin" ~ "Bassin de la rivière Stewart",
          sub_basin == "White River Basin" ~ "Bassin de la rivière White",
          sub_basin == "Lower Yukon River Basin" ~ "Bassin inférieur du fleuve Yukon",
          sub_basin == "Porcupine River Basin" ~ "Bassin de la rivière Porcupine",
          sub_basin == "Peel River Basin" ~ "Bassin de la rivière Peel",
          sub_basin == "Liard River Basin" ~ "Bassin de la rivière Liard",
          sub_basin == "Alsek River Basin" ~ "Bassin du fleuve Alsek",
          sub_basin == "Coastal South-East Alaska Snow Courses" ~ "Stations nivométriques côtières en Alaska", # Example replacement
          TRUE ~ sub_basin # Default case to keep original names if not listed
        ))
    }

    # Replace cells with NA with "-"
    tabl[is.na(tabl)] <- "-"


    ##### Create flextable ####

    flextable::as_grouped_data(tabl, groups = "sub_basin") %>%
      flextable::as_flextable(hide_grouplabel = TRUE) %>%
      flextable::bold(bold = TRUE, part = "header") %>%
      flextable::align(part = "header", align = "center") %>%
      flextable::align(align = "center", j = c(2:10)) %>%
      flextable::bold(i = ~ !is.na(sub_basin)) %>%
      flextable::bg(bg = "#0097A9", part = "header") %>%
      flextable::color(color = "white", part = "header") %>%
      flextable::hline(part = "all") %>%
      flextable::vline(part = "body") %>%
      flextable::border_outer() %>%
      flextable::autofit() %>%
      flextable::width(j = 1, width = wdth[1]) %>%
      flextable::width(j = 2, width = wdth[2]) %>%
      flextable::width(j = 3, width = wdth[3]) %>%
      flextable::width(j = 4, width = wdth[4]) %>%
      flextable::width(j = c(5, 6, 7, 8), width = wdth[5]) %>%
      flextable::width(j = 9, width = wdth[6]) %>%
      flextable::width(j = 10, width = wdth[7]) %>%
      flextable::font(fontname = "Nunito Sans", part = "all") %>%
      flextable::fontsize(size = size, part = "all") %>%
      flextable::fontsize(j = 2, size = 7.5) %>%
      flextable::fontsize(j = 3, size = 7.5) %>%
      flextable::line_spacing(space = 1) %>%
      flextable::padding(padding.top = 0.8, padding.bottom = 0.8)
  },
  error = function(e) {
    cat("Table generation error: ", e$message, "\n")
  }
)
```

```{r correction factors, echo=FALSE}
# Get information about the correction factor applied
twin_correction_note <- DBI::dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT note FROM sample_series WHERE location_id = 86")
twin_corrections <- as.numeric(strsplit(gsub(".*?([0-9]\\.[0-9]+).*?([0-9]\\.[0-9]+).*", "\\1 \\2", twin_correction_note$note), " ")[[1]])
# twin_correction_pts <- gsub(".*from ([0-9]+) data points.*", "\\1", twin_correction_note$note)

hyland_correction_note <- DBI::dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT note FROM sample_series WHERE location_id = 170")
hyland_corrections <- as.numeric(strsplit(gsub(".*?([0-9]\\.[0-9]+).*?([0-9]\\.[0-9]+).*", "\\1 \\2", hyland_correction_note$note), " ")[[1]])
# hyland_correction_pts <- gsub(".*from ([0-9]+) data points.*", "\\1", hyland_correction_note$note)
```

`r 
if (language$abbrev== "en") {
paste0("
<p>&nbsp;</p>
**Date notes:**
